item.title: Cake Day / Birthday Dump
item.description:
Yeah I joined this awesome community on my actual birthday and it’s been 8 glorious years since you filthy animals constantly bring joy to my life. Thank you all.
Crypto Tax :)
item.dc:creator: sehnaoui

item.title: The Ancient Texts pt-12
item.description:
Subtitle: A Phone Clearing Dump Been a minute gang. Welcome back to June 2019, what a time to be alive.
Asked my dog about this. His silence said everything...
I turn on the trailing path to max and I've had multiple people think my computer is broken. I purposely turn it on on work computers now just to fuck with people.
See also Canada *loosens coller nervously*
Anyone remember Leo and Satan?
Al... phonse... Play now?
New COD school edition
Fiance did this first year Engineering. Madwoman.
Strive for maximum efficiency workers.
Always be supportive when friends are discussing coming out. It is a challenging time.
I currently live in one of the Canadian Territories. Y'all got NOTHING on me! Below -50C it's too cold to even snow bro you have no idea. It's a fun place tho above -20 I recommend visiting at least once.
Respect
Judge recently ruled a burrito is a sandwich. LOOK IT UP!!
Yum
Vine 2 isn't as good and has suspicious privacy concerns change my mind.
Deus Vault!
It was a simpler time.
"weow you guys must really like Halloween"
Bb
Spread as you will
item.dc:creator: WaywardJester

item.title: All the other escaping inflatables are just seeking freedom so pure.
item.dc:creator: FluxSagrie

item.title: Absolutely mind blowing
item.description: This kind of artistic skill will never not amaze me. Always wished I could do something like this, but I'm much more likely to severely injure myself permanently before ever reaching this level, for I am an uncoordinated klutz who routinely burns themselves on the oven door when baking. Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C7OdR93uqrg/
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Seems like it should be in a video game

item.title: Glad nothing like this happens to humans. Right?
item.dc:creator: RedCamaro

item.title: Posion Ivy - Bride Cosplay
item.description:
Always proud of my Poison Ivy Bride Cosplay from the Harley Quinn Animated series. The hours it takes when I do body paint like this is insane, but always worth it. Even worth all the green splotches on walls and door handles and my camera equipment I have to wash later :P
Reference image!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: It’s my birthday woo
item.description: It’s my birthday! A few days ago I did my own nails as a gift to myself but they only lasted 3 whole days lol (they were only meant to last a week as it is) and this was one thing I had to try out….I hated it to say the very least ? Looks so pretty for pictures but it’s just not functional for me. Mad props to the harpists out there I’ve seen with full acrylics! There’s another video with some REALLY self explanatory faces I’d made reacting some of the god awful clunky sound they were making against the strings. Playing harp with nails is usually a huge no no for techniques that aren’t based around the Hispanic style of playing. So not having the space to accommodate my finger tips and let the strings vibrate. Or else you get some…interesting sounds lol But I am hoping I’ll be able to post more from my birthday. When Imgur will let me Im not sure but we shall see what the day holds <3
item.dc:creator: SursieMetzger

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #28
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: Please wear a helmet
item.description: This is my friend Adam. He was killed Monday on his Harley when he was hit by an SUV. He didn't have his helmet. Based on the severity of the crash, it is unlikely that a helmet would have helped, but you never know. He left behind his wife and 3 kids all under the age of 10. He was my best friend for the past 20 years. I miss my friend Edit: Thank you all for the kind words.
item.dc:creator: MightyZephyr

item.title: Meme Library: Volume 33
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. Your resident screeching bird woman is here to deliver another batch of funny stuff.
I have an approximate knowledge of many things
they're all good boys Bront
I still have no idea what I'm doing and I'm not sure if I ever will
Of course I would fall off and drift forever in the void of space
oh fuck
That one over there used to be a Radio Shack
Hell yeah. But remember, be aware of people's weapon preferences! Some people might like a sword, others a mace. I'm a dagger person myself.
Ahhh yes, makes perfect sense now
I usually go with a "hey guys" or "what's up my dudes"
and agains!
Oh man, after many years (and many colors) I have somehow resisted doing stupid shit to my hair for about 3 years now. It's almost down to my ass and I'm in awe at my newfound self control.
he a little confused, but he got the spirit
He's not wrong!
hello, fellow sun bears All right, that's all for this dump folks. Until next time, stay awesome
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.56 GHITS & SHIGGLES
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: JeeHyung Lee
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Fhin - Picture of You (Crayon Remix) YouTube: https://youtu.be/cIBuGW8yo7Y?si=r0TpB5Gpa4pPcW8x Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/1iTe8SttNZMoD4lU6Vw9C6?si=320eac8ce29649cf
ICM Original / https://twitter.com/PathosMeta
Leondro Abe
Loopy Dave
Marina Sailer
Carl Jung
Kawase Hasui
beast7bobo
cookiekappa
Wellington Phelippe
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra, @DerpyVaz ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Progress on my hand stitched patchwork skirt
item.description: It’s not perfect by any means, but it’s fun. It is entirely fashioned from scrap fabric I had on hand. I’m going to add pockets, beads to the yarn cord, and decorative patches. Also please forgive the bad lighting, for it’s past midnight where I am on this earth.
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount
